subject: [NBI] Add Ingress to NBI
commit_message:
[NBI] Add Ingress to NBI

Give configuration so NBI can be access through ingress.

Issue-ID: OOM-2172
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I72d3d685645d64aa16712603677cc5764f2bc800

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1
